title: hieracium lactucella subsp. tricheilema
intro: Hieracium lactucella subsp. tricheilema, also known as Trichomanes tricheilema, is a rare species of flowering plant in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is a type of fern-like herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Hieracium lactucella subsp. tricheilema are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. In terms of health benefits, the plant has been traditionally used to treat colds, fever, and digestive issues, and it is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its therapeutic effects.
